Class InvitationPage

java.lang.Object
pages.InvitationPage
public class InvitationPage extends Object
InvitePage class represents the page where an admin can generate an invitation code. The invitation code is displayed upon clicking a button.

    • show

      public void show(DatabaseHelper databaseHelper, javafx.stage.Stage primaryStage)
      Displays the Invite Page in the provided primary stage.
      Parameters:
      databaseHelper - An instance of DatabaseHelper to handle database operations.
      primaryStage - The primary stage where the scene will be displayed.
